title: Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 released for UG & PG April/ May/ June exams. Check semester-wise exam schedule, NEP & Non-NEP date sheets, and download PDF at exams.puchd.ac.in.

sections.heading: Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 OUT

content.text: Panjab University Chandigarh has officially released the Date Sheet 2026 for May examinations. Students can now check and download the Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 for various undergraduate and postgraduate courses on the official website - exams.puchd.ac.in.

The examinations are scheduled for April/May/June 2026 for even semesters (2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th) under NEP (FYUP) and Non-NEP schemes. Students should download the relevant PDF according to their course and semester. Keep your roll number and other details ready while verifying the schedule.
Students are advised to verify all information carefully from the official PDF and contact the Examination Branch in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 Overview

content.text: Panjab University has published the detailed date sheets for May 2026 examinations. The timetable covers regular, reappear, improvement, and additional candidates across multiple programmes under both NEP and old schemes.
Direct Link to Download Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 Here

sections.heading: How to Download Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 directly from the official examination portal. Follow these simple steps to get your timetable quickly.

items: Go to the official Panjab University Examination website at https://exams.puchd.ac.in/datesheet.php?dsheet=1.
Select the appropriate category such as Undergraduate Courses, Postgraduate Courses, or NEP.
Locate your specific course and semester in the list.
Click on the date sheet title or PDF link for your programme.
The PDF will open. Save it to your device and take a printout if needed.
Read all instructions mentioned in the date sheet carefully.

content.text: Always refer to the latest official date sheet and keep a copy for your exam preparation and reference.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official Punjab University Chandigarh Date Sheet 2026 PDF contains complete information needed by students for smooth examination preparation.

items: Examination Name and Session (April/May/June 2026)
Semester and Course Details
Scheme - NEP (FYUP) or Non-NEP
Subject/Paper Name with Code
Exact Date and Day of Exam
Examination Timings (Usually 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM)
Category (Regular, Reappear, Improvement)
Important notes and instructions for candidates.
